title: How Often...?
questions: How often do you study English? How often should you study?
How often are you in trouble with someone? Who and why?
How often do you feel on top of the world? Is it a good feeling?
How often do you like going shopping?
How often do you think about the world's future? Are they good thoughts?
How often do you get angry with other people? Who are they?
How often did you get presents when you were a child?
How often do you wish you were somewhere else of someone else? Who and where?
How often should you exercise? How often do you exercise?
How often are you ill? Is this more or less often than your friends?
How often do you do you think 'how often do I have to do this'? What is it you think about?
How often do you worry about your hair and the way you look? Is it a problem for you?
How often do you check your e-mail?
How often is too often?
How often do you change your mobile phone? Why?
How often do you wish you had special powers? What are these powers?
How often do you spoil yourself?
How often do you think about money? Is this good or bad?
How often will you study English in the future?
How often did you cry when you were younger? What were the main reasons?
